name: Dave the Diver
description: Trainer for Dave the Diver (Proton, Unity IL2CPP). Class layout from Il2CppDumper. Patches target PlayerBreathHandler methods in GameAssembly.dll.

fields.name: Infinite Oxygen
fields.description: NOPs PlayerBreathHandler.BreathUpdate so oxygen never decreases while diving.

patches.description: Replace 'push rdi' with 'ret; nop' at PlayerBreathHandler.BreathUpdate — breath consumption skipped

fields.name: Invincible
fields.description: Patches PlayerBreathHandler.set_HP to only accept values >= current HP. Damage is blocked but healing and oxygen pickups still work.

patches.description: Replace set_HP entry with: load current HP, compare with new value, return if new < current. Blocks all HP decreases while allowing increases.
